description: Coordinate the full planning lifecycle from input assessment through sign-off, seam review, and bead decomposition.

review_round_target.description: Expected number of review rounds before sign-off

steps.title: Draft plan docs and test harness docs
steps.description: Assign plan-draft work by dependency batch from {{plan_index_doc}} so each component gets both a plan doc and a companion test harness.

steps.title: Run review round 1 in {{review_mode}} mode
steps.description: Assign plan-review beads, collect independent findings, and keep reviewers isolated from one another.

steps.title: Incorporate round 1 findings
steps.description: Run plan-incorporate on each reviewed plan and discuss any P0/P1 issues with reviewers before merging changes.

steps.title: Summarize round 1 convergence
steps.description: Run plan-summarize and evaluate whether review findings are converging quickly enough.

steps.title: Repeat review and incorporation cycles until convergence
steps.description: Choose deep, batch, or full-corpus review for each additional round until the plans are ready for approval.

steps.title: Approve planning corpus for {{project_name}}
steps.description: Resolve all open questions, mark docs Approved, and append the plan review signoff section to each plan.

steps.title: Run seam review across approved plans
steps.description: Use plan-seam-review to verify adjacent plan docs agree on shared interfaces and fix any P0/P1 mismatches.

steps.title: Generate {{implementation_guide_doc}}
steps.description: Synthesize seam findings, review themes, lifecycle invariants, config contracts, and common pitfalls into a guide every implementation agent must read.

steps.title: Decompose approved plans into implementation beads
steps.description: Run plan-to-beads after the implementation guide is in place so the implementation backlog respects reviewed dependencies.
